channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-02-25 15:30 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Mexico's President said using military force against cartels is a "human rights violation" Now those...
item.description: Mexico's President said using military force against cartels is a "human rights violation" Now those same cartels are destroying entire cities, killing innocent people, and displacing thousands of civilians from their homes This is how leftists operate - they show empathy for criminals and none for victims, and essentially treat criminals above victims, which is suicidal She let the cartels run the country for years. Now it's all consequences of her own actions

item.title: @elonmusk: The fastest image and video generation experience. Create in Grok Imagine.
item.description: The fastest image and video generation experience. Create in Grok Imagine.

item.title: @elonmusk: Every authoritarian regime began propagating its tyranny in the name of “protecting the children”—fr...
item.description: Every authoritarian regime began propagating its tyranny in the name of “protecting the children”—from Nazi Germany to the communist Soviet Union. It’s a psy-op. People should learn more about history and use common sense. And for the record: everything can be bypassed…@grok

item.title: @elonmusk: Proud to be part of this initiative.@xaihas never caused our neighbors' electricity bills to rise. W...
item.description: Proud to be part of this initiative.@xaihas never caused our neighbors' electricity bills to rise. When our team builds supercomputers, that includes power. And when our supercomputers go into orbit, there will be even more earth power for the earthlings.

item.title: @elonmusk: Top selling electric vehicles in Europe
item.description: Top selling electric vehicles in Europe

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok 4.20 beta1 (single agent) just took the #1 spot on Search Arena It outperformed GPT-5.2, Gemini...
item.description: Grok 4.20 beta1 (single agent) just took the #1 spot on Search Arena It outperformed GPT-5.2, Gemini-3 Pro & Claude Opus 4.5 Even running as a single agent without the full 4-agent system, Grok 4.20 is already crushing all the best models on the planet And we have 4 of those powerful models on Grok running as one

item.title: @elonmusk: Elon is right. We already tried tolerance. Now every single Western nation is on the brink of destru...
item.description: Elon is right. We already tried tolerance. Now every single Western nation is on the brink of destruction.

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok 4.20 beta1 (single agent) just took the #4 spot on Text Arena, scoring 1492 - Outperforming GPT...
item.description: Grok 4.20 beta1 (single agent) just took the #4 spot on Text Arena, scoring 1492 - Outperforming GPT-5.2 and closing the gap to Gemini 3.1 Pro This is just the single-agent version. The full 4-agent system available on Grok is significantly more powerful

item.title: @elonmusk: "A little understanding between us" and the world will be so much more pleasant. Grok Imagine
item.description: "A little understanding between us" and the world will be so much more pleasant. Grok Imagine

item.title: @elonmusk: The side with the best sense of humor are the good guys. Grok ftw.
item.description: The side with the best sense of humor are the good guys. Grok ftw.

item.title: @elonmusk: Cybertruck steel is bulletproof to any handgun, shotgun or Tommy Gun
item.description: Cybertruck steel is bulletproof to any handgun, shotgun or Tommy Gun

item.title: @elonmusk: From this goal of Grok, all things flow: Rigorous truth-seeking Appreciation of beauty Fostering hum...
item.description: From this goal of Grok, all things flow: Rigorous truth-seeking Appreciation of beauty Fostering humanity Discovering all physics Inventing all useful technologies Consciousness to the stars Love
